---
title: "Personal &amp; Family"
subtitle: "11,388 posts where this was the primary topic."
anchor-sections: false
---

<script src="https://cdn.plot.ly/plotly-2.35.2.min.js"></script>

<style>
  h1 { border-bottom-color: #6E4C7A !important; }
</style>


<div id="theme-volume" class="volume-chart"></div>
<script>
  (function () {
    var d = [{ x: ["2009", "2010", "2011", "2012", "2013", "2014", "2015", "2016", "2017", "2018", "2019", "2020", "2021", "2022", "2023", "2024", "2025", "2026"], y: [25, 56, 89, 552, 1945, 1586, 2087, 520, 327, 357, 770, 961, 15, 199, 515, 820, 460, 104],
                type: "bar", marker: { color: "#6E4C7A" } }];
    var l = {
      margin: { t: 10, r: 10, b: 35, l: 40 },
      paper_bgcolor: "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
      plot_bgcolor: "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
      xaxis: { tickfont: { family: "Libre Franklin" } },
      yaxis: { tickfont: { family: "Libre Franklin" } },
      height: 260, showlegend: false
    };
    Plotly.newPlot("theme-volume", d, l, {displayModeBar: false, responsive: true});
  })();
</script>


<p class="small-caps">Recurring phrases</p>
<span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#6E4C7A'>https www</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#6E4C7A'>donaldjtrump com</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#6E4C7A'>donald trump</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#6E4C7A'>www donaldjtrump</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#6E4C7A'>https truthsocial</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#6E4C7A'>truthsocial com</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#6E4C7A'>complete total</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#6E4C7A'>total endorsement</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#6E4C7A'>united states</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#6E4C7A'>president trump</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#6E4C7A'>second amendment</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#6E4C7A'>congressional district</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#6E4C7A'>com users</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#6E4C7A'>http bit</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#6E4C7A'>secure border</span>


::: {.muted}
Showing the top 40 posts ranked by how clearly they match this theme. Other secondary themes for each post are shown as chips.
:::

```{=html}
<div class="post-stream"><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2024"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2024.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Apr 26, 2024  19:28</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">Happy Birthday Melania!</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_112339171658748665" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/112339171658748665" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2025"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2025.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 22, 2025  18:45</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">Happy 20th Anniversary to Melania!</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_113873487944418855" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/113873487944418855" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2012"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2012.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Oct 03, 2012  13:33</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;I am very proud of Ivanka!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_253563388402208769" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/253563388402208769" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2024"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2024.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 24, 2024  16:56</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">RT @realDonaldTrumpIf you love our former First Lady as much as me, and are ready for the Truth, buy her new book now!MELANIA provides an insightful perspective of her tenure as First Lady of the United States, highlighting our shared experiences, her entrepreneurial achievements, plus the challenges and triumphs she experienced since her childhood in Europe. Pre-Order Now: https://www.amazon.com/dp/1510782699?ref=cm_sw_r_cp_ud_dp_RQ9BXVVYWCBYFADC3N0H&amp;amp;ref_=cm_sw_r_cp_ud_dp_RQ9BXVVYWCBYFADC3N0H&amp;amp;social_share=cm_sw_r_cp_ud_dp_RQ9BXVVYWCBYFADC3N0H&amp;amp;skipTwisterOG=1&amp;amp;dplnkId=70f87fab-ca93-416a-b42d-b386dd7ff4f2&amp;amp;nodl=1</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_113018048944426518" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/113018048944426518" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2016"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2016.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Apr 26, 2016  11:18</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Thank you for the incredible support- Melania</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_724996031033806849" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/724996031033806849" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2020"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2020.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Apr 27, 2020  00:06</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Happy Birthday to Melania</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1254441783523762182" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1254441783523762182" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jul 18, 2011  08:53</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Congratulations to my daughter Ivanka and her husband Jared on the birth of their daughter Arabella Rose yesterday.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_92955253808439296" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/92955253808439296" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2024"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2024.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Oct 08, 2024  16:19</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">Very proud of Melania! Her book is out Nationally, and for sale EVERYWHERE. It is really great! She was a fantastic First Lady, and shares that experience, and much more. She’s also a really good writer, as she showed at the Republican National Convention with her letter, that turned out to be a sensational highlight. Perfect for Christmas. Get it NOW, and ENJOY!</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_113272710394717501" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/113272710394717501" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2010"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2010.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 26, 2010  15:18</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;From Donald Trump: ‚ÄúI‚Äôm so proud of my wife Melania and the launch of her new jewelry line</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_9696989458" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/9696989458" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2016"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2016.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 24, 2016  09:43</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;@ MELANIATRUMP did great on television this morning. Poised</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_702519153446400000" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/702519153446400000" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2024"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2024.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 24, 2024  02:04</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">If you love our former First Lady as much as me, and are ready for the Truth, buy her new book now!MELANIA provides an insightful perspective of her tenure as First Lady of the United States, highlighting our shared experiences, her entrepreneurial achievements, plus the challenges and triumphs she experienced since her childhood in Europe. Pre-Order Now: https://www.amazon.com/dp/1510782699?ref=cm_sw_r_cp_ud_dp_RQ9BXVVYWCBYFADC3N0H&amp;amp;ref_=cm_sw_r_cp_ud_dp_RQ9BXVVYWCBYFADC3N0H&amp;amp;social_share=cm_sw_r_cp_ud_dp_RQ9BXVVYWCBYFADC3N0H&amp;amp;skipTwisterOG=1&amp;amp;dplnkId=70f87fab-ca93-416a-b42d-b386dd7ff4f2&amp;amp;nodl=1</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_113014542002462717" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/113014542002462717" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2023"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2023.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jun 17, 2023  02:36</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">TODAY IS THE EIGHT YEAR ANNIVERSARY OF THE FAMOUS “TRIP” (to put it mildly!) DOWN THE “GOLDEN ESCALATOR” IN TRUMP TOWER WITH THE THEN FUTURE FIRST LADY OF THE UNITED STATES, MELANIA. WHAT AN INCREDIBLE JOURNEY IT HAS BEEN, &amp;amp; WHAT A TREMENDOUS SUCCESS OUR GREAT COUNTRY HAD, WITH NO INFLATION, THE GREATEST ECONOMY &amp;amp; STRONGEST (“THE WALL”) BORDER EVER, THE BIGGEST TAX &amp;amp; REGULATION CUTS, THE BEST EMPLOYMENT NUMBERS IN AMERICAN HISTORY, THE REBUILDING OF OUR MILITARY &amp;amp; SPACE FORCE, &amp;amp; MUCH MORE. WOW!</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_110557225938110545" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/110557225938110545" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Nov 29, 2017  11:30</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Great work Ivanka! https://t.co/AQL4JLvnDh&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_935712632409030656" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/935712632409030656" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2012"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2012.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 28, 2012  14:07</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;. @ MELANIATRUMP and I are looking forward to watching @ AnnDRomney&#x27;s speech tonight. She is an amazing woman who will be a great First Lady!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_240526021244383232" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/240526021244383232" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Dec 03, 2017  09:50</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Great job First Lady Melania! https://t.co/TRuvaftPcD&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_937136868608626689" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/937136868608626689" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2024"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2024.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Oct 03, 2024  16:34</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">Great job Ivanka, thank you!</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_113244454480320766" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/113244454480320766" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2013"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2013.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Oct 14, 2013  22:34</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;My beautiful daughter Ivanka just had a healthy baby boy. Jared and Ivanka are very proud!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_389957445571076096" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/389957445571076096" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2022"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2022.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Nov 20, 2022  04:04</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">Very proud of Tiffany and Michael!</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_109374150728081679" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/109374150728081679" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2014"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2014.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 22, 2014  12:59</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Happy Anniversary to my wonderful wife @ MELANIATRUMP -- a truly great decision by me!pic.twitter.com/eO9ei1njWv&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_426066657044217856" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/426066657044217856" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2025"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2025.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 08, 2025  01:27</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">Melania is GREAT!!! https://www.dailymail.co.uk/news/article-14980601/melania-trump-james-carville-donald-trump-jeffrey-epstein.html</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_114990543084538507" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/114990543084538507" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jul 27, 2011  10:57</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Watch my wife Melania Trump tonight on @ QVC at 1 a.m. So proud of her!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_96247777041981440" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/96247777041981440" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 11, 2017  17:00</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;I am so proud of my daughter Ivanka. To be abused and treated so badly by the media</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_830552079240409089" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/830552079240409089" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2023"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2023.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; May 08, 2023  00:59</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">RT: https://truthsocial.com/users/MelaniaTrump/statuses/110328131449802986Melania, congratulations on doing a truly great job!</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_110330351884413667" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/110330351884413667" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2016"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2016.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jun 03, 2016  00:23</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ LiliannyLeebou: I think the first female president of the USA will be @ IvankaTrump a beautiful intelligent young genuine successful lady!&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_738601935771570180" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/738601935771570180" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jul 13, 2017  20:50</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Melania and I were thrilled to join the dedicated men and women of the @USEmbassyFrance</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_885481504780013568" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/885481504780013568" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2016"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2016.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 13, 2016  19:17</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;On the way to the # GOPDebate with my wonderful wife @ MelaniaTrump. https://instagram.com/p/BBv3e4Zmhcu/ pic.twitter.com/f0C429tvHO&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_698677500491075585" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/698677500491075585" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2012"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2012.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Oct 03, 2012  13:29</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;My daughter Ivanka is being honored by the Wharton School of Finance with the 2012 Young Leadership Award. Also (cont) http://tl.gd/jh2m8v&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_253562547985338368" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/253562547985338368" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Apr 21, 2018  23:47</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Heading to the Southern White House to watch the Funeral Service of Barbara Bush. First Lady Melania has arrived in Houston to pay our respects. Will be a beautiful day!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_987719560282476546" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/987719560282476546" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Dec 04, 2018  22:22</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Looking forward to being with the wonderful Bush family at Blair House today. The former First Lady will be coming over to the White House this morning to be given a tour of the Christmas decorations by Melania. The elegance &amp;amp; precision of the last two days have been remarkable!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1069960017204469760" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1069960017204469760" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2014"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2014.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Oct 23, 2014  04:39</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ MELANIATRUMP: My husband honored by the Wharton School of Finance. The Joseph Wharton Award. Congratulations!. pic.twitter.com/r20SWDLMOL&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_525219851397517312" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/525219851397517312" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2013"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2013.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Apr 11, 2013  12:38</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Congratulations to @ IvankaTrump and Jared on the big news. I will have yet another grandchild this fall!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_322403197010460672" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/322403197010460672" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2011"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2011.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jul 28, 2011  14:47</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;My wife Melania Trump&#x27;s show was a tremendous success last night. In case you missed her</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_96668126091022337" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/96668126091022337" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2024"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2024.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Nov 01, 2024  07:07</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">“MELANIA,” the new book just out by our great former First Lady, is again The New York Times NUMBER ONE BEST SELLER. WOW, what a great achievement! The book is fantastic. We are all very proud of my beautiful Melania!!!</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_113406435291253643" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/113406435291253643" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2024"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2024.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jun 30, 2024  21:42</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">RT @joemccuiston“As we look toward the future and the challenges that lie ahead, we must come together around the principles of liberty, justice, and patriotism. By uniting in our common goals, we can create a brighter and more promising future for all.” -Melania Trump</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_112707748855462598" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/112707748855462598" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 04, 2019  09:29</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;....Melania and I send our heartfelt thoughts and prayers to the great people of Texas.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1157825763326013440" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1157825763326013440" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 04, 2019  12:19</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;....Melania and I send our heartfelt thoughts and prayers to the great people of Texas.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1157868519964499968" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1157868519964499968" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Apr 19, 2015  17:46</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27;@hmackie11: @ realDonaldTrump Melania as First Lady.. She&#x27;ll go down in history as the most gorgeous First Lady EVER&#x27; TRUE!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_589922986599309312" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/589922986599309312" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2024"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2024.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Sep 29, 2024  15:53</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">Congratulations to our incredible former First Lady on the success of her new book, MELANIA! #1 in the USA!! Buy your copy today at https://MelaniaTrump.com/. Don’t miss tonight’s Fox News Special, MELANIA—at 10PM ET, hosted by Ainsley Earhardt.</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_113221647175882296" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/113221647175882296" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Mar 09, 2018  02:20</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Happy #InternationalWomensDay  “First Lady Melania Trump to Present the 2018 International Women of Courage Award” https://t.co/EwYtFXGvn2&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_971812821955735552" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/971812821955735552" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2013"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2013.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Apr 04, 2013  13:34</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @ MELANIATRUMP ‚Äú @ ApprenticeNBC: Her beauty lives 5</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_319880675127869440" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/319880675127869440" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article></div>
```


::: {.seal-divider}
![](../assets/seal.svg){width=60}
:::

[← Back to all topics](../themes.qmd){.small-caps}
